desc.cn: 你走完了這趟中國生存線。不算完美，但你活著出境了。
desc.en: You finished the China survival route. Not perfect — but you exited alive.

desc.cn: 高本地化分數說明你真的學會了掃碼、預約與隨機應變。香港只是畢業禮。
desc.en: High locality means you learned scanning, booking, and improvising. Hong Kong is just the graduation gate.

title.cn: 精神值歸零：買機票回國

desc.cn: 預約、拒收、掃碼與排隊掏空了你。你打開航司 App，選擇了『逃離』。
desc.en: Bookings, rejections, QR codes and queues emptied you. You open the airline app and choose escape.

title.cn: 時間耗盡：簽證壓力爆表

desc.cn: 剩餘停留時間歸零。你來不及走完地圖，只能倉促處理離境或延期焦慮。
desc.en: Remaining stay hits zero. The map is unfinished — only exit anxiety remains.

desc.cn: 地圖、乘車碼、翻譯與叫車同時消失。沒電的夜晚，城市變得陌生而巨大。
desc.en: Maps, transit codes, translate and ride-hail vanish together. A dead phone makes the city vast and foreign.
